content:
# Spontaneous Imbibition

**Summary**: A test where oil-saturated cores are placed in EOR fluids to measure recovery driven by capillary forces.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022]] applied spontaneous imbibition to link wettability alteration directly to oil recovery results.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Spontaneous imbibition results indicate that when wettability alteration happens, both enhancing wettability alteration and alleviating IFT reduction can increase and accelerate the oil recovery. ([[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022, p. 21]])
